title: VanillaQOL
description: VanillaQOL is a modpack with small improvements that aims to feel and play like vanilla Minecraft. (Performance, better user interfaces etc...)
body:
# Welcome to VanillaQOL

## The purpose of this modpack:
I wanted to make a simple modpack to easily download my favourite optimizations and quality of life changing mods, texturepacks/shaders.

## Included shaders and texturepacks:
- Complementary Reimagined
- Default Dark Mode
- Using Resourcify you can browse/add/update texturepacks and shaders ingame!

## If you have issues starting the game:
- Make sure to disable RTSS (RivaTuner Statistics Server) to make this modpack work (Sodium issue).
- Update drivers (especially GPU)

## Additional mods that can be useful:
- Mouse Tweaks - Slightly better mouse usability
- Controlify - Adds controller support
- Controlling - Keybinds stuff

## My preferred settings:

### Java memory: 
- 6144MB

### Video settings:
- FOV: 90
- Brightness: 100 (Bright in Sodium)
- VSync: OFF
- Max Framerate: 60/150 depending on device
- View Bobbing: ON
- Vignette: ON

### Accessibility:
- Monochrome Logo: ON
- Narrator Hotkey: OFF
- Damage Tilt: 50%
- Show Subtitles: ON
- Auto-Jump: OFF
- Sprint and Sneak: Hold

### Controls:
- Toggle Perspective: Left Alt
- Toggle Cinematic Camera: F8
- Operator Items Tab: ON
